Elemental (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $154,426,697Details
International Box Office $342,017,611
Worldwide Box Office $496,444,308
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,799,975
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,021,336
Total $4,821,311
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In a city where fire, water, land, and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy are about to discover something elemental: How much they actually have in common.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,602,429 (19.2% of total gross)
Legs:5.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,035 opening theaters/4,080 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $168,824,801

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2023 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 14th, 2023 (Wide), released as Elemental (엘리멘탈) (South Korea)
June 14th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)

June 15th, 2023 (Wide), released as Mezi živly (Czech Republic)
June 15th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 15th, 2023 by Disney Pixar

In a city where fire, water, land, and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy are about to discover something elemental: How much they actually have in common.
